tagLine: I craft performant digital experiences — from pixel-perfect interfaces to scalable backend systems. Where engineering meets design thinking.

aboutMe.name: Dhanuja Isuru
aboutMe.bio: Building the future, one line at a time. I'm Dhanuja Isuru, a passionate Full-Stack Developer and UI/UX Engineer with a strong focus on creating products that are both technically robust and visually compelling. I bridge the gap between design and engineering — transforming complex ideas into seamless digital experiences.
aboutMe.tagLine: My work spans React applications, Node.js microservices, AI chatbot systems, and full-stack web platforms. I believe great software is not just about functionality — it's about how it feels to use.
